description: History of all market research (segment discovery) attempts and outcomes

columns.id: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY — Unique attempt ID (auto-incrementing)
columns.day: INTEGER — Simulation day of the attempt
columns.cost: REAL — Amount spent on this attempt
columns.success: INTEGER — 1 if a new segment was discovered, 0 if not
columns.discovered_group_id: TEXT — Group ID discovered (NULL if unsuccessful)
